prettyhandsomebabe:

the unbearable urge to worship her body, slowly kissing every part, every curve, every fibre of her skin, steadily working my way through all of it, making sure to not miss any spot. dazed eyes and melting lips, my body becoming one with hers. taking hours and hours, losing sight of time, not even remembering how we started. flowy silhouettes merging, lazily kisses and wandering hands. be my goddess


sapphic post <3 men and minors dni.
